Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course teaches marketing management and strategy, which are fundamental to business growth, innovation, and job creation, supporting economic productivity (Targets 8.2, 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is in an innovation-focused institute and aims to '培養創新思考' (cultivate innovative thinking), directly supporting innovation and enterprise development (Targets 9.3, 9.5, 9.b).
